text.tspan: Everything stays local. CDP is a small fallback branch, not the main control path.

text.tspan: The runtime stays local, and CDP is used as a fallback path for the parts the normal DOM path cannot reach.

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, ui-monospace, Cascadia Mono, Liberation Mono, monospace
